name: classify_attendance_holiday_functional
description: Checks that an employee is classified as Holiday when the holiday_status is True.
input: POST /classify with AttendanceInput: employee_id='E004', checkin_time=null, shift_start='09:00', leave_status='None', holiday_status='True', date='2024-06-01'
output: AttendanceOutput with success=True, attendance_status='Holiday', message containing 'Holiday'
